route.name: Hartman Rocks Overnighter
route.description: Public GPX short desert overnighter with Hartman Rocks singletrack/dirt, designated camping, and exposed terrain.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX short desert overnighter with Hartman Rocks singletrack/dirt, designated camping, and exposed terrain.
route.bestSeason: Spring and fall are best; summer can be hot, so July is a fallback only with a cool forecast.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX short desert overnighter with Hartman Rocks singletrack/dirt, designated camping, and exposed terrain.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: South Beaver Creek can be filtered; otherwise carry route water.
resources.food: No route resupply; full services in Gunnison.
resources.camping: Designated sites plus dispersed options; weekend competition must be checked.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before gate confirmation.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Do not promote for a hot July weekend.
Use as a fallback if the forecast is unusually cool.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control gate confirmation.
